comment: Affiliate redirect config — WatchingAbroad. Update target_url when Kristian provides real affiliate links.

smart-dns-proxy.name: Smart DNS Proxy
smart-dns-proxy.note: Self-serve affiliate. Requires Kristian to create account.

nordvpn.name: NordVPN
nordvpn.note: Apply via CJ Affiliate. Requires site with 5+ articles first.

surfshark.name: Surfshark
surfshark.note: 40% rev share via Impact Radius. Apply after 5 articles live.

pia.name: Private Internet Access
pia.note: Tier 2. Apply after Tier 1 is live.

windscribe.name: Windscribe
windscribe.note: Tier 2. 30% rev share, good free tier.
